rationale: Educ. Code §48.005 governs calculation of average daily attendance for school funding. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter any ADA methodology or operative text in this section. No direct conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 48.005. AVERAGE DAILY ATTENDANCE. (a) In this chapter, average daily attendance is:
_note: No conflict. §48.005 addresses attendance calculation methodology, not property tax exemptions or homestead values. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) does not require amendment to this section.
